title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: BEAVERTON FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers recreation opportunities including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. 9685 SW Harvest Court Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 644-2191 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 644-2191 Main phone Main phone (503) 644-2191 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship LANGUAGES: Varies by agency AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 6am-10pm, Friday 6am-9pm, Saturday 7am-6pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS PROGRAMS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHILDCARE & MORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
